message:
chore: audit batch 494 — 6 uncommitted files audited, all SOUND

Audited uncommitted changes from other agents:
- messaging/service.rs (+421L): admission validation additions
- database/mysql.rs (+89L): cancel-correctness fix for commit/rollback
- database/postgres.rs (+46L): identical cancel-correctness fix
- service/buffer.rs (+44L): close() wakes parked waiters
- trace/file.rs: eliminated try_into().unwrap() panic
- session.rs (+62L): map_send_error helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
